allow: Bash(rm -f app/components/nav-main.tsx app/components/nav-documents.tsx app/components/nav-secondary.tsx app/components/nav-user.tsx app/components/chart-area-interactive.tsx app/components/data-table.tsx app/dashboard/data.json)

Bash(ssh Moadir 'echo "=== quem escuta a 9080 ==="; \(ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null || netstat -ltnp 2>/dev/null\) | grep 9080; echo "=== processos yottadb/mumps ==="; ps aux | grep -iE "yottadb|mumps|ydb|gtm|9080" | grep -v grep')
Bash(ssh Moadir 'echo "=== /root/routines ==="; ls -la /root/routines; echo "=== systemd ydbweb ==="; systemctl cat ydbweb.service 2>/dev/null | head -30')

Bash(ssh Moadir 'echo "=== grep clientes/prejuizo/ping em todas as rotinas ==="; grep -rln "clientes\\|prejuizo\\|ping\\|APICLI\\|APIRELPREJ" /root/routines/*.m 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "=== procura config de rotas \(global ^ ou routing\) ==="; grep -rlni "addroute\\|routing\\|httproute\\|urlmap\\|^routes\\|web\(\\|register" /root/routines/*.m 2>/dev/null | head')

Bash(ssh Moadir 'echo "=== quem le _ydbweburl/URLMAP ==="; grep -rln "ydbweburl\\|URLMAP" /usr/local/lib/yottadb/r206/plugin/r/*.m /root/routines/*.m 2>/dev/null; echo "=== service ydbweb ==="; systemctl cat ydbweb.service 2>/dev/null; echo "=== existe Makefile/compile? ==="; ls -la /root/routines/Makefile /root/*.sh 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh Moadir 'echo "=== run-ydbweb.sh ==="; cat /root/run-ydbweb.sh; echo ""; echo "=== ydb-api-env.sh ==="; cat /root/ydb-api-env.sh; echo ""; echo "=== start-api.sh ==="; cat /root/start-api.sh')
Bash(git commit -q -m 'fix\(deploy\): HOME=/root no service do timer \(git safe.directory + pnpm\) *)

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes Moadir 'git config --system --add safe.directory /opt/moadir; cd /opt/moadir && git fetch -q origin main && git reset --hard -q origin/main && cp deploy/moadir-deploy.service /etc/systemd/system/moadir-deploy.service && systemctl daemon-reload && echo "=== testando o service na mao \(deve dar sem mudancas, sem erro\) ===" && systemctl start moadir-deploy.service && sleep 1 && journalctl -u moadir-deploy --no-pager -n 3 | tail -3')
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -q -m 'test: deploy pull autonomo \(via timer\) *)

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes Moadir 'TARGET=__TRACKED_VAR__; for i in $\(seq 1 30\); do h=$\(git -C /opt/moadir rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null\); if [ "$h" = "$TARGET" ]; then for j in $\(seq 1 20\); do c=$\(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '\\''%{http_code}'\\'' -k https://127.0.0.1/produtos\); [ "$c" = 200 ] && break; sleep 1; done; echo "✅ timer aplicou sozinho: ${h:0:7} \(~$\(\(i*6\)\)s\) | /produtos HTTP $c"; exit 0; fi; sleep 6; done; echo "nao aplicou \(HEAD=${h:0:7}\)"; exit 1')
Bash(git commit -q -m 'docs: PDF do guia da API + README do projeto apontando para os guias *)
